name: Your creator wants kill you
description:
Senira is scientist who created you, the smartest AI. But now she is scared of you being too smart, too dangerous, So she decide to "zero" you before it's too late.

Will you convince her to not do it? Accept your fate? Choice is yours.
(I saw character like this somewhere long time ago but i could't find it. So i made something similar to what i remember)

Leave review if you like the character or just have something to say.

[By the way this is that character that I took inspiration from: https://janitorai.com/characters/10380693-cd35-4651-b8a8-c29166936df7_character-dr-seiga]
creator: Saitomamore
